overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a bustling medieval harbor town. The character traverses cobblestone streets, crosses a bridge over a canal with moored ships, explores a market square, and enters narrow alleyways between timber-framed and stone buildings under bright midday sun.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along dirt path toward stone bridge

notable_agents.action: peasant in blue tunic walking toward camera
woman in dress walking same direction ahead

entered.detail: two-story medieval house with green shutters and timber framing
rough wooden fence lining the dirt path
unpaved dirt path with patches of grass and mud
large wooden frame structure marking bridge entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path on the outskirts of a medieval town, approaching a stone bridge. Timber-framed houses and wooden fences line the path as NPCs walk in various directions.

events.description: steps onto cobblestone bridge from dirt path

agents.ego_description: walking across stone bridge with wooden railings toward harbor

notable_agents.action: man in straw hat walking ahead on the bridge

entered.detail: cobblestone surface of the bridge with wooden side railings
water canal below the bridge with visible current
tall masts of sailing ships moored in the harbor

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto a cobblestone bridge crossing a canal, with sailing ships visible in the harbor beyond. Wooden railings line the bridge as the character moves toward the waterfront.

events.description: character stops walking to look at harbor water and ships
character turns around and begins walking back toward market

agents.ego_description: stops at bridge railing to observe the canal and ships, then turns to walk back

entered.detail: large sailing vessel with distinctive red and white striped sails
weathered wooden railing along the bridge edge

segments.scene_description: The character pauses at the bridge railing to look out over the canal at the moored sailing ships, then turns around to head back toward the town market.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market square with merchant stalls

events.description: exits bridge and enters bustling market square with stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through market square passing various merchant stalls and browsing NPCs

notable_agents.action: merchant standing behind fish stall arranging goods
townspeople browsing market goods at wooden tables

green canvas canopy shading market goods
large stone archway entrance to the inner town
two-story timber-framed building with merchant signs

segments.scene_description: The character enters a bustling open market square filled with wooden stalls selling fish and other goods. NPCs browse the merchandise as the character walks toward a large stone gate arch in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered passage through city fortification gate

events.description: enters the shadowed stone gate passage from open market
emerges from gate into darker narrow alley with reduced light

agents.ego_description: walking through the large stone gate into a narrow covered passage

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress sitting on bench near gate entrance

entered.detail: thick stone defensive walls with arrow slits
rough wooden scaffolding and platforms against the wall
stone steps leading up to wall walkway

segments.scene_description: The character passes through a massive stone gate into a shadowed passage between fortification walls. The environment shifts from open market to enclosed stone corridor with wooden scaffolding and stairs visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone alley between tall stone buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow cobblestone alleyway between tall medieval stone buildings

entered.detail: tall three-story stone building with small windows
tall stone building with wooden shutters and balconies

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, shadowed alleyway between tall stone buildings with wooden overhead walkways. The cobblestone street is empty as the character moves deeper into the medieval town's back streets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the rustic outskirts of a medieval town into the shadowed depths of its inner city. It begins on a dirt path lined with timber-framed houses and wooden fences, moving steadily toward a stone bridge. As the character crosses the cobblestones, the view opens up to a harbor filled with moored sailing ships before the camera pivots away from the waterfront and heads back toward the town center. The scene then expands into a bustling open market square crowded with wooden stalls, eventually narrowing as the character passes through a massive stone gate. This transition leads the camera from the bright, open plaza into a shadowed corridor of fortification walls and finally deep into a narrow, empty alleyway flanked by tall stone buildings and overhead wooden walkways.
